contents:
## Sanctioned Ocean Jet and Lumina Ocean Tankers Transit Strait of Hormuz

### Overview
Sanctioned tanker Ocean Jet and shadow fleet vessel Lumina Ocean traverse Strait of Hormuz. US sanctions target Ocean Jet for financing Iranian drone sales. MarineTraffic data reveals movements Friday night through Saturday morning.

### Event Details
Sanctioned tanker **Ocean Jet** navigates Strait of Hormuz alongside Curacao-flagged **Lumina Ocean**, both under US sanctions. Ocean Jet faces penalties for facilitating clandestine Iranian drone sales and financing. Lumina Ocean belongs to Iran's shadow fleet of petroleum tankers since December sanctions. MarineTraffic data tracks passages from Friday night into Saturday morning. Iranian cargo ship shadows Iran's coastline during transit. Four cargo ships, Omani passenger ferry, and Russian pleasure yacht Nord accompany movements. Nord departs Dubai Friday, passes south of Larak Island Saturday. @TheRealShipDude highlights tanker shadow fleet operations evading sanctions. Vessels demonstrate persistence in Hormuz despite penalties. US authorities classify these ships central to Iran's illicit oil trade and drone proliferation. Shadow fleet expands to circumvent restrictions on petroleum exports. Analysts monitor transits for escalation risks in tense waterway. Iran continues reliance on flagged vessels for covert shipments. Russia links emerge via yacht presence amid broader geopolitical tensions. Shipping experts warn fleet growth challenges enforcement. Hormuz remains chokepoint for global energy flows. Incidents underscore sanctions evasion tactics employed by sanctioned actors.

### Source Context
@TheRealShipDude (TheRealShipDude) covers this category of developments. The account focuses on vessel identification imo sanctions iran russia tanker shadow fleet shipping.
